title: Just-in-Time Context：按需检索而非预加载
title_en: Just-in-Time Context: Retrieve on Demand, Not Upfront

body.problem: 长时间运行的 agent 会跨多轮对话积累大量知识（项目背景、用户偏好、历史决策）。如果每次都把所有信息预加载到 context window，会迅速耗尽 token 预算，导致 context rot——模型在海量信息中迷失，输出质量下降。
body.solution: 使用 memory tool 实现 just-in-time context：agent 在工作过程中把学到的知识写入 /memories 文件，下次需要时再按需读取相关文件。这样 context window 始终只包含当前任务真正需要的信息，而非所有历史信息。
body.keyTakeaway: Memory tool 的核心模式是「先存后取」：写入时不占 context，读取时按需加载。这让 agent 拥有无限的知识积累能力，同时保持 context window 精简高效。

body_en.problem: Long-running agents accumulate knowledge across many conversations (project context, user preferences, past decisions). Preloading everything into the context window each time quickly exhausts the token budget and causes context rot — the model gets lost in a sea of information and output quality degrades.
body_en.solution: Use the memory tool for just-in-time context: the agent writes what it learns to /memories files during work, then reads only the relevant files on demand next time. The context window always contains only what the current task actually needs, not all historical information.
body_en.keyTakeaway: The core pattern of the memory tool is 'store then retrieve': writing doesn't consume context, reading loads on demand. This gives agents unlimited knowledge accumulation while keeping the context window lean and focused.
